BrowserProfileId.description: The id of the browser profile.
BrowserProfileId.markdownDescription:
The id of the browser profile.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,47}-[a-zA-Z0-9]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption

BrowserProfileArn.description: The ARN of a BrowserProfile resource.
BrowserProfileArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of a BrowserProfile resource.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws(?:-cn|-us-gov|-iso(?:-[bef])?)?):bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:browser-profile/[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,47}-[a-zA-Z0-9]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
